profile.name: Shrikrishna Handibag
profile.title: S.Y IT Engineering Student | Web Developer & Open Source Contributor | GSSoC 2026 | Building with Java, Python & AI 🚀
profile.intro: I build modern web applications and explore the startup ecosystem.
profile.aboutStory: I started my journey with a deep curiosity for how things work on the internet. Now I build full-stack web applications and am currently exploring my startup idea.
profile.linkedinAbout:
Hey, I'm Shrikrishna — a Second Year IT Engineering student at JSPM's Rajarshi Shahu College of Engineering, Pune, with a deep passion for building things that matter.

I started coding out of curiosity, and now I'm on a mission to turn every project into a learning milestone. From crafting web apps to diving into open-source, I believe the best way to grow is to build in public and contribute to the community.

🔥 Currently:
• Selected as a Contributor & Mentee at GSSoC 2026 (Open Source Track + AI Agents Track)
• Building real-world projects in Java, Python, and Web Development
• Developing my portfolio at portfolio-tau-three-joek7fsz4x.vercel.app

💡 What drives me:
I love the intersection of clean code and creative thinking. Whether it's debugging a tricky problem, collaborating on open-source, or experimenting with AI tools — I'm always learning something new.

🎯 Looking for:
Internships, open-source collaborations, hackathons, and opportunities to work with teams that value growth and innovation.

Let's connect and build something great together! 🚀

profile.startupVision: DevConnect - An all-in-one platform for developers, students, and companies.

projects.title: DevConnect Platform
projects.description: A comprehensive developer platform for startups and students.

projects.title: Portfolio CMS
projects.description: A dynamic portfolio with a built-in admin dashboard.

achievements.title: IIT Kharagpur - "Discover Yourself" Session Course
achievements.description: Successfully completed the "Discover Yourself" session course from IIT Kharagpur, earning recognition for performance. This journey has been an incredible opportunity for self-reflection, growth, and learning.

achievements.title: Oracle Certified Associate – MySQL HeatWave Implementation
achievements.description: Earned the Oracle Certified Associate – MySQL HeatWave Implementation Certified Associate certification from Oracle University. Validates skills in MySQL database management, HeatWave implementation, and performance optimization.

nowLogs.content: Optimized the entire portfolio mobile responsiveness and fixed card layout clipping.
nowLogs.documentation: Rewrote Tailwind responsive breakpoints for all major sections. Fixed overflow clipping on project cards, adjusted padding on mobile hero, and resolved horizontal scroll bleed on the activities carousel.
changes: Fixed card clipping on small screens
Adjusted hero padding and font sizes

nowLogs.content: Designed a custom, high-fidelity falling stars splash screen with glowing tail effects.
nowLogs.documentation: Built a canvas-based particle system with randomized star velocities, glowing tail trails using radial gradients, and smooth opacity transitions. The splash screen renders at 60fps and gracefully fades into the main app.

nowLogs.content: Deep diving into Web3 protocols and decentralized application state management.
nowLogs.documentation: Explored Ethereum, Solana, and IPFS-based storage patterns. Compared state management approaches: on-chain vs. off-chain hybrid solutions. Built a small demo connecting MetaMask to a React frontend.

nowLogs.content: Built the full admin panel with CRUD operations, GitHub sync, and settings management.
nowLogs.documentation: Designed a glassmorphism-styled admin dashboard with profile editing, skills/projects/achievements CRUD, background image/video support, and a music player bar. Integrated GitHub API for direct data.json deployment.

sandboxIdeas.title: DevConnect Hub
sandboxIdeas.description: An all-in-one hub for student hackathons and developer collaborations.
sandboxIdeas.notes: Currently implementing real-time messaging and team formation features.

sandboxIdeas.title: Retro Web Game Suite
sandboxIdeas.description: A collection of 8-bit web games styled with neo-brutalist layouts.
sandboxIdeas.notes: Thinking about integrating multiplayer socket lobbies.

sandboxIdeas.title: AI Resume Roast Bot
sandboxIdeas.description: A fun tool that takes a PDF resume and roasts it using an AI LLM agent.
sandboxIdeas.notes: Buried due to API usage cost constraints and market saturation.

activities.title: 🚀 Great learning experience at the Generative AI Workshop!
activities.description:
🚀 Great learning experience at the Generative AI Workshop!

I recently attended an insightful Generative AI workshop hosted by Vaibhav Sisinty — Founder of GrowthSchool and a well-known tech educator with 300K+ subscribers on YouTube & 500k+ Follows on LinkedIn.

The session was packed with practical insights on how AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) are changing the way we build products.

💡 Key takeaways from the workshop:

• How to evaluate and choose the right LLM for different tasks
• Practical use of AI for building dashboards and analytics tools
• Understanding AI workflows and automation
• A powerful 6-month roadmap to master Generative AI

One of the most exciting parts was seeing how AI can help developers quickly build data dashboards, insights tools, and production-ready applications.

As a 2nd year IT student, sessions like this motivate me to keep exploring AI, startups, and building impactful tech products.

Looking forward to experimenting more with AI tools, automation, and intelligent systems.

Thanks to Vaibhav Sisinty and the GrowthSchool team for the valuable session! 🙌

activities.title: 🚀 Excited to share that PromptQuill is now officially Op...
activities.description:
🚀 Excited to share that PromptQuill is now officially Open Source 🎉
After months of building, experimenting, improving prompts, and shaping the overall experience, I’ve finally decided to open-source the project for the community.
PromptQuill is built to help developers, creators, and AI enthusiasts work smarter with prompts, AI workflows, and productivity tools — all in one place. ✨
💡 Why Open Source?
Because great products become even better when the community contributes, experiments, and innovates together.
I want PromptQuill to grow with:
🌍 Community contributions
⚡ New ideas & integrations
🛠 Better developer experience
🤝 Collaboration with builders worldwide
🔥 What I’m Looking Forward To
• Contributors & collaborators
• Feedback from developers/designers
• Open-source community support
• Building powerful AI-driven features together
This is just the beginning. 🚀
More exciting updates, features, and improvements are coming soon.
If you love AI, SaaS, open source, or building cool products — let’s connect and build together. 💙
🔗 GitHub Repository:
https://lnkd.in/dAt2JXHm

activities.title: My open-source journey officially starts today. 🚀
activities.description:
My open-source journey officially starts today. 🚀

Selected as a Contributor & Mentee at GSSoC 2026 — out of 35,000+ applicants.

I'll be working across two tracks:
⚙️ Open Source Track
🤖 AI / Agents Track

But this isn't just about writing code.

Over the next 3 months, I'm committing to:
↳ Contributing to real, impactful projects
↳ Learning from experienced mentors
↳ Exploring AI and modern web development
↳ Becoming a better builder — every single day

Open source taught me that growth happens in public. So that's exactly what I'll do — build, ship, and share.

Huge thanks to GirlScript Foundation for creating this platform and making it free for developers everywhere 🙏

To everyone starting their open-source journey: the best time to begin is right now.

Let the journey begin ✨
